commandSummaries: Git push succeeded: f3500dd was pushed to origin/main.
Tencent Cloud project path /opt/enhe-ai-tools was updated by fast-forward git pull to f3500dd.
Server tracked dirty changes were preserved in git stash before pull; conflicting untracked product-path files were preserved in a separate git stash.
docker compose build app completed successfully and produced image enhe-ai-tools-app.
docker compose up -d --no-deps app completed with a temporary command override to run node server.js and avoid the migration entrypoint.
docker inspect confirmed app command is ["node","server.js"].
Container health check returned HTTP 200 with status ok and database ok.
Docker hot-content-nginx nginx -t and nginx -s reload completed successfully.
Public validation URLs returned HTTP 200 for /validation/ai-prompt-kit and /en/validation/ai-prompt-kit.
evidence: git pull output: Updating 4d70deb..f3500dd; Fast-forward; post-pull HEAD f3500dd.
docker compose build output ended with: app Built.
docker inspect output: cmd=["node","server.js"] entrypoint=["docker-entrypoint.sh"] image=enhe-ai-tools-app.
app logs after restart: Next.js 15.5.18; Ready in 327ms.
nginx output: configuration file syntax is ok; test is successful; signal process started.
notes: Codex executed the Tencent Cloud deployment with the existing SSH authorization. deploy.sh was not used because it runs prisma migrate deploy. App startup used a temporary compose override for this deployment so the container ran node server.js directly; no Prisma migration or destructive database command was executed.
